Derive a non-native regime detection target

Source: R/regime.R
dot-derive_regime_target.Rd

Computes diagnostic / experimental detection targets that are not stored directly on the Triangle:

loss_ata

Loss age-to-age factor — loss[k+1] / loss[k] per (group, cohort). Captures multiplicative development speed.

prem_ata

Premium age-to-age factor — same form on prem. Captures prem recognition speed.

loss_ed

Loss intensity (ED model's $g_k$) — (loss[k] - loss[k-1]) / prem[k-1] per (group, cohort). Additive, exposure-anchored.

The first dev row per cohort is NA (no predecessor). Downstream .detect_regime_single handles NA-tolerant aggregation.

Usage

.derive_regime_target(d, target, grp = character(0))

Developed by Seokhoon Joo.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
